productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Red Top
description: Composition Red round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, embroidered brand logo on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery gini and jony's Gini and Jony line have come up with this pretty top for the apple of your eye! girls will love to dress up in this comfy cotton top and a pair of jeans or a skirt.
